title: Releashed
description: A Bukkit plugin that allows to use leashes on players.
body:
# Releashed

An open-source plugin allowing players to use leashes on each other. Includes tying to fences.

When a leashed player disconnects, they get 20 HP damage. Players tied to fences cannot unleash themselves or each other except if they use shears.

> Currently there are no configs or commands, but they will probably get added later.

[**GitHub repository**](https://github.com/Nidzuhoguro/Releashed)

Idk maybe gimme a star on **GitHub** or contribute :3
You can also report issues there.
